blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this journey! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Learned about the value of data transformations and when to use them.
- Applied common transformations such as add field from calculation, group by, and filter by value.
- Exported your transformations as a CSV file.

---

### More to explore (optional)

The world is your oyster! Read more about how you can:

- [How to work with multiple data sources in Grafana dashboards: best practices to get started](https://grafana.com/blog/2024/11/07/how-to-work-with-multiple-data-sources-in-grafana-dashboards-best-practices-to-get-started/)
